The Process

How PartSouq Works

From search to delivery — verified, trusted, cash on delivery.

01

Enter Your Car

Brand, model, year & spec for exact fitment.

02

Search & Select

Filter by condition, OEM & verified seller rating.

03

Cash on Delivery

Pay cash only after the part arrives and you confirm it is correct.

04

Track Delivery

Live status updates & WhatsApp alert on dispatch.

05

Confirm & Done

Confirm the part is correct and pay cash to our delivery agent. Done.

 CHANNEL PARTNER PORTAL

Become a Partner

Two registration paths — choose the one that fits your business. Everything managed in one place.

SPARE PART SUPPLIER

List Your Parts. We Bring the Buyers.

List genuine spare parts. Buyers search by their exact car — your listing appears when it matches. Payment is cash on delivery, collected upon receipt. As the seller, you verify each part matches the buyer's vehicle before dispatch to ensure the right part reaches the right car.

GARAGE / WORKSHOP

Take Bookings. We Handle the Service.

Receive verified customer bookings directly from PartSouq. You focus on the repair work — customers pay you cash on delivery after the service is complete and confirmed. Pickup & drop service coordination available.

PartSouq operates on Cash on Delivery only. Collect cash directly from the customer after service completion and their confirmation. No online payments, no bank transfers from the buyer.

WHY BUYERS TRUST PARTSOUQ

Built Around Buyer Protection

Every feature on PartSouq exists to protect you — before, during and after purchase.

🔒

Cash on Delivery

Pay cash only after the part arrives and you confirm it is correct. No online payments, no card details, no bank transfers — ever.

Every Listing Reviewed

No part goes live without a PartSouq review. OEM number, photos and compatibility are all checked before buyers can see it.

👥

218 Verified Partners

Every seller and garage is reviewed by our team before being listed on the platform.

📍

7 Emirates, One Platform

Parts listed from sellers across all 7 Emirates. Search once — compare prices and delivery from verified sellers nationwide.

📱

WhatsApp Updates

Order confirmed, dispatched and delivered — all notified via WhatsApp, keeping things simple with no portals to check.

📝

Dispute Resolution

Wrong part? Damaged item? PartSouq reviews every dispute directly. Payment is never released until the issue is resolved.

Shop with Confidence

Deal alerts & restock notifications.

Buyer-exclusive offers, new verified seller announcements and part availability alerts.

Get in Touch

Leave your details and our team will reach you back at the earliest to resolve your issue or provide support.

Payment Statement

Returns & Policies

Returns

PartSouq operates on Cash on Delivery — all inspection and approval happens at the moment of delivery, before you pay and before you accept the part. If it's incorrect, damaged, or doesn't match what was listed, you decline it on the spot and pay nothing.

Returns are only accepted at the time of delivery. Once you've inspected the part, accepted it, and paid, the sale is final — there is no after-delivery return window, so please check the part carefully before accepting.

Parts installed by a third party, or damaged after delivery due to misuse, are not eligible for return.

Shipping & Delivery

Delivery timeframes shown on each listing are estimates provided by the seller and typically range from 1–3 days depending on part availability and your Emirate.

A PartSouq delivery agent brings the part to your address. You inspect it on the spot before paying — nothing is charged in advance.

Delivery is currently available across Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah, and Umm Al Quwain.

Privacy

PartSouq collects only the information needed to fulfil your order or booking: name, phone number, delivery address, and vehicle details you choose to provide (such as chassis or plate number) to help match the correct part.

We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes. Your details are shared only with the verified seller or garage fulfilling your specific order or booking.

PartSouq does not store payment card details, since all transactions are Cash on Delivery.

Terms of Service

By using PartSouq, you agree that all listings are provided by independent, PartSouq-verified sellers and garages, and that PartSouq acts as the marketplace connecting buyers with these partners.

Payment for all parts and services is Cash on Delivery, made directly at the point of delivery or service completion, after your inspection and approval.

PartSouq reserves the right to remove any listing or account found to be fraudulent, counterfeit, or in violation of these terms, and to suspend accounts pending investigation of a dispute.

Partner Terms & Conditions

Sellers and garages joining PartSouq are subject to a verification review before approval. PartSouq may request a trade licence, sample listing photos, or other documentation as part of this review.

Billing: Sellers are billed on a 30-day cycle; garages on a 7-day cycle. Accounts are automatically restricted from login if a cycle lapses without payment, and reinstated once payment is confirmed with the PartSouq team.

Listings: All listings and their photos must accurately represent the part being sold. Misrepresented, counterfeit, or unsafe parts will result in listing removal and may result in account suspension.

Payments: All buyer payments are Cash on Delivery, collected directly by the seller or garage at the point of delivery or service completion. PartSouq does not process or hold partner funds, and does not add any markup on top of the price you set — the buyer pays exactly what you list.
